---
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---
# Antibiotic resistance in humans {#sec-arh}

{{< include Overview_of_surveillance_systems_and_methods_for_ast.qmd >}}

{{< include Overview_of_sampling_and_culture_results.qmd >}}

{{< include Ecoli_Kpneum_Entero_ESBL_ESBLcarba.qmd >}}

{{< include Saureus_MRSA.qmd >}}

{{< include Enterococcus_faecalis_faecium_VRE.qmd >}}

{{< include Spneumoniae_PRP.qmd >}}

{{< include Hinfluenzae.qmd >}} 

{{< include Paeruginosa.qmd >}}

{{< include Acinetobacter.qmd >}}

{{< include Spyogenes.qmd >}}

{{< include Sagalactiae.qmd >}}

{{< include Shigella.qmd >}} 

{{< include Mtuberculosis.qmd >}}

{{< include Ngonorrhoeae.qmd >}} 

{{< include Nmeningitidis.qmd >}} 

{{< include Cdifficile.qmd >}}

{{< include Cauris.qmd >}}

{{< include Zoonotic_Campylobacter.qmd >}}

{{< include Zoonotic_Salmonella.qmd >}}
